zh.title: 戈登·摩尔预言全集 - 摩尔定律与半导体革命的14条预言与验证 | Gordon Moore Prophecies

en.title: Gordon Moore Prophecies - 14 Predictions from the Father of Moore's Law (1929-2023) | Full Archive & Verification
